events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need respond with exactly JSON. Need evaluate scenario. It says field condition for Spool erection & fit-up compared with referenced drawing/manufacturer sheet. Tags, ratings, layout callouts line up with installed work, revision block current. Reference material: ASME B31.3, project iso drawings. Stage tested/inspected. No component conditions flagged. So decision pass, risk low. Need fill all fields. work_stage tested/inspected. component_conditions empty list. percent_complete maybe 100? Stage tested/inspected suggests overall progress near complete for this scope. value 0. sound_source empty string? Schema string; can be "" . event_time 0.0 rate 0.0 order empty list. workable empty list. findings empty list. actions empty list. rationale brief. references ASME B31.3 and project iso drawings. Ensure no prose. Need raw JSON.
